title: [WIP] Set up staging system for documentation workflow
body:
Thanks for asking me to work on this. I will get started on it and keep this PR's description up to date as I form a plan and make progress.

> Please look at https://github.com/mattleibow/GitHubStagingPages/blob/main/GITHUB_PAGES_SETUP.md 
> 
> And the repo workflows in  https://github.com/mattleibow/GitHubStagingPages
> 
> We need to set up a staging system here. Look how we do docs now and move us to a place where we can have a main and a staging system. 
> 
> Please check every file and think deeply before you start.


<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

✨ Let Copilot coding agent [set things up for you](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp.Extended/issues/new?title=✨+Set+up+Copilot+instructions&body=Configure%20instructions%20for%20this%20repository%20as%20documented%20in%20%5BBest%20practices%20for%20Copilot%20coding%20agent%20in%20your%20repository%5D%28https://gh.io/copilot-coding-agent-tips%29%2E%0A%0A%3COnboard%20this%20repo%3E&assignees=copilot) — coding agent works faster and does higher quality work when set up for your repo.
